headline: Dow jumps 800 points, S&P 500 at new record, Nasdaq gains 6.8% this week
summary: All three of the market indexes (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) closed Friday's session with significant gains, led by the Dow Jones Industrial Average which rose by nearly 868 points (1.79%) in the day. The S&P 500 ended the trading week 4.5% higher while the Nasdaq Composite surged by 6.84%. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre notes the fresh record highs for US stocks.

headline: Market rally breakdown: Dow Jones, bitcoin, Tesla, and more
summary: On Friday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average (^DJI) surged over 800 points, while both the S&P 500 (^GSPC) and Nasdaq Composite (^IXIC) gained over 1% each. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a look at the week's biggest market moves, including action from the "Magnificent Seven" (MAGS), semiconductor sector (^SOX), software sector (IGV), CBOE Volatility Index (^VIX), 10-year Treasury yields (^TNX), the US dollar (DX-Y.NYB), bitcoin (BTC-USD), and more.
